title: Ancient writers suggest AI generates text but does not truly write, scholar argues
description: A writing professor coined "generwrite" to separate what AI produces from human writing. Unlike AI text, human writing emerges from lived experience and aims to move people and create change.

title: Iranian Scientist Suggests Ancient Pyramids as Extraterrestrial Communication Beacons
description: A scientist from Iran has proposed that the pyramids may have been celestial transmitters, suggesting a potential connection between ancient structures and extraterrestrial life.

title: Ancient MMO Final Fantasy 11 still has new things on the horizon 24 years after launch
description: The other Final Fantasy MMO is still doing its thing.

title: Federal NDP leader Avi Lewis addresses Saskatchewan fossil fuel job concerns in Regina
description: Federal NDP leader Avi Lewis sought to ease concerns about fossil fuel job losses during a stop in Regina’s Cathedral neighbourhood Thursday.

title: Ancient Pompeii doctor identified by medical instruments found in cast
description: Researchers use X-rays, CT scans, and 3D technology to uncover medical kit carried by victim fleeing Mount Vesuvius eruption in 79 AD
